message:
feat(mux): add auto-resume on page load and prevent OOM with semaphore

Fixed two critical issues with large file downloads:

1. Auto-resume on page load:
   - App.svelte now calls ensureFileWs() after initialization
   - Opens file WebSocket automatically to trigger resume logic
   - Previously resume only triggered when manually starting a transfer

2. Memory exhaustion prevention:
   - Added semaphore with 32 permits to limit concurrent goroutines
   - Prevents spawning 500+ goroutines simultaneously for large directories
   - Each goroutine acquires semaphore before processing, releases after done
   - Server was being OOM-killed when downloading .zig-cache (500+ large files)

Changes:
- App.svelte: Call ensureFileWs() in onMount after callback setup
- main.zig: Add goroutine_sem semaphore to FileGoroutineCtx
- main.zig: processFileGoroutine() waits/posts on semaphore

Result:
- Downloads auto-resume after page reload
- Server stays stable even with massive directories
